name: epubjs
when_to_use: 要在浏览器里渲染/翻页一本 EPUB 电子书(分页或滚动流、目录跳转、CFI 定位、进度记忆)时用它。PDF 用目录里的 pdfjs-dist;Word 用 mammoth/docx-preview。容器需固定像素高,widget 建议先用 probes/ 活验 shadow。
why_valuable: EPUB 是 zip+XHTML+CSS 复合电子书格式,原生 AI 无法解压、解析 spine/manifest、分页重排、在沙箱 iframe 里渲染章节;想「翻开一本 .epub 来读」纯手写不可能。

data_in.note: default export 是 ePub 工厂:ePub(url|ArrayBuffer) → Book;book.renderTo(el, options) → Rendition;rendition.display(cfi?)。url 需可跨域取;内容在沙箱 iframe 里渲染,容器需固定像素高。

schema.url: string | ArrayBuffer —— .epub 文件地址或已加载的二进制
schema.flow?: 'paginated' | 'scrolled' | 'scrolled-doc' —— 翻页 or 滚动流,默认 'paginated'
schema.height?: number —— 阅读器高度 px(禁 vh),默认 600
schema.startCfi?: string —— 起始 EpubCFI 定位(进度记忆),默认书首

spec.note: iframe 阅读器需固定像素高;flow:'paginated' 按容器尺寸分页,:host 撑高、禁 vh/百分比高。

en.when_to_use: Use it to render and page through an EPUB ebook in the browser (paginated or scrolling flow, table-of-contents navigation, CFI positioning, progress memory). For PDFs, use pdfjs-dist from the catalog; for Word, use mammoth/docx-preview. The container needs a fixed pixel height; for widgets, live-test shadow support under probes/ first.
en.why_valuable: EPUB is a composite zip+XHTML+CSS ebook format. Native AI cannot unpack it, parse the spine/manifest, reflow pagination, and render chapters in a sandboxed iframe. Hand-writing an experience that opens and reads an .epub is not practical.

data_in.note: The default export is the ePub factory: ePub(url|ArrayBuffer) -> Book; book.renderTo(el, options) -> Rendition; rendition.display(cfi?). url must be fetchable cross-origin. Content renders inside a sandboxed iframe, and the container needs a fixed pixel height.

schema.url: string | ArrayBuffer -- .epub file URL or already loaded binary data
schema.height?: number -- reader height in px (no vh); default 600
schema.startCfi?: string -- initial EpubCFI position (for progress memory); defaults to the beginning of the book

spec.note: The iframe reader needs a fixed pixel height. flow:'paginated' paginates from the container dimensions; let :host grow, and do not use vh or percentage heights.

uplink: 翻页/定位进度若需外传,由消费 AI 接 rendition.on('relocated'|'rendered') 原生事件(带 EpubCFI)并按载体处理,本条不预设事件契约。

carriers.widget: conditional-unverified:iframe 渲染,老库依赖 document/head/body,shadow 未活验,widget 前先走 probes/
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN,书页在沙箱 iframe 内自隔离

isolation.evidence: +esm 同时导出 default `ePub` 工厂与具名 Book/Rendition/EpubCFI/Layout/Contents(grep: 'W as default','dt as Book','lt as Rendition','ot as Contents','m as EpubCFI','St as Layout')。API ePub(url|ArrayBuffer) → Book;book.renderTo(element: Element|string, options?: RenditionOptions) → Rendition;rendition.display(target?) 见 types/book.d.ts + rendition.d.ts。RenditionOptions width/height/flow/spread/manager/minSpreadWidth/allowScriptedContent 均真实。重运行时:打包 jszip/localforage/lodash/@xmldom/xmldom/marks-pane/event-emitter(npm deps);+esm grep document.body=21、document.head=4——章节在构建于容器内的沙箱 <iframe> 里渲染(内容经 iframe 隔离,但 manager 为测量与 marks-pane 批注触及 body/head)。globalEvents=yes:window resize + iframe load 监听。shadowCompatible=conditional 且未活验:容器挂 shadow、iframe 内容自隔离理论可行,但 epub.js 偏老且倚重 document 引用,widget 上线前用 probes/ 验证。
